3115690.name: RPG Maker MV - Rogue Adventure - Ruins Tileset
3115690.description:
Explore dungeons created hundreds of years ago with the Rogue Adventure - Ruins Tileset! ELV Games continues their Rogue Adventure series with Ace and MV/MZ-sized tiles to create mossy temple exteriors and smooth dungeon interiors. A1, A2, A3, A5, and 12 B sheets include all the tiles you’ll need to create a bunch of dungeons scattered across your game world! Choose from light and dark stone to build mossy buildings surrounded by lush grass and small algae-filled ponds, and have crypts and tombstones warn your players that undead enemies may be around. Let your heroes unlock doors to side rooms that offer up more lore to the dungeon with benches and pots that show people actually lived there, and create dramatic ceremony rooms with raised platforms and broken columns around a pool of blood that mysteriously stays red no matter how many years have past.

This pack also includes 21 character sprites for objects to add puzzles, flames, and mystical guiding messages to your dungeons! Light up hallways with flickering flames and mark important doorways with glowing runes that switch between green and blue, or show that magic flows through the entire area by having columns release runes made of energy into the air. Challenge your players with puzzles where they need to step onto buttons in specific sequences, and give them easy ways to escape with large waypoints that let them return to the dungeon after a quick pit stop in the nearest town. If you’ve been looking for stone hallways and mossy floors for your heroes to explore, pick up the Rogue Adventure - Ruins Tileset!


Ruins Pack contains Ancient Ruins tilesets and Ruins tilesets!

”Ancient Ruins” and “Ruins” Content:

・Animated torches, candles, glyphs, doors, waypoints, stones
・Multiple types of walls, grounds
・Multiple types of objects
・Variation of colors
・Lots of props to create your ruins!


Terms of Use:

This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
OK to be used in Commercial projects
Contents can be edited
OK for use in games with gore
OK for use in adult-rated games
3115690.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 日语, 韩语, 繁体中文, 阿拉伯语, 简体中文
